name: cal-to-al
description: Convert NAV C/AL .txt files to AL Business Central objects.

calToAl.type.description: Convert only a specific object type (--type). Leave empty to convert all types.

calToAl.extensionStartId.description: Starting numeric ID for extension objects, incremented by 1 for each. Default: 70000000.

calToAl.injectDotNetAddIns.description: Inject standard .NET add-in definitions into the resulting .NET package (--injectDotNetAddIns).

calToAl.dotNetAddInsPackage.description: Path to an AL file containing custom .NET type declarations to include in the .NET package (--dotNetAddInsPackage). Leave empty to not set.

calToAl.dotNetTypePrefix.description: Prefix for all .NET type aliases created during conversion (--dotNetTypePrefix). Leave empty to not set.

calToAl.addLegacyTranslationInfo.description: Add legacy translation mapping info to translation files to help migrate existing translated resources.

calToAl.runtime.description: Target AL runtime version, e.g. '15.0'. Leave empty to use the latest supported runtime.

calToAl.objectFileNamePattern.description: Pattern for naming AL object files. Placeholders: {name}, {type}, {id}. Default: {type}-{id}.{name}.

calToAl.extensionObjectFileNamePattern.description: Pattern for naming AL extension object files. Placeholders: {name}, {type}, {id}, {targetName}, {targetId}. Default: {type}-{id}.{name}.

calToAl.dataClassificationDefaulting.description: Default DataClassification property value applied to all table fields that don't have it set. Leave empty to not set.

calToAl.tableDataOnly.description: For table objects, convert only table and field definitions. Methods and trigger code are excluded.

calToAl.verboseLogging.description: Enable verbose logging. Captures full conversion details to the log file.
